Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters

Class RemoveMembershipRewriterImpl

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.DefaultRewriter
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.AbstractRewriterImpl
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.RemoveMembershipRewriterImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFormulaRewriter, IFormulaRewriter2
public class RemoveMembershipRewriterImpl extends AbstractRewriterImpl
Basic manual rewriter for the Event-B sequent prover.

    • rewrite

      public Predicate rewrite(RelationalPredicate predicate)
      Description copied from interface: IFormulaRewriter
      Rewrites the given predicate.
      Specified by:
      rewrite in interface IFormulaRewriter
      Overrides:
      rewrite in class DefaultRewriter
      Parameters:
      predicate - predicate to rewrite
      Returns:
      the given predicate rewritten
